title: The Worst Generation Faces the Emperors
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Kaido as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You shitty brat! Even after getting your ass beat, you're still saying that!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The voice of an Emperor responds from the roof.!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The "Haki" he learned from that old man in Wano...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe a punch actually damaged kaidou!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This battle is not lost after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not going to let it slide this time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does a brat like you even under- stand...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What it means to be the pirate King!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What happened after I crushed him in Kubu?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are only a handful of people that can fight me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that you are just as great as they are!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it!! Even though I saw the future...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're putting up a decent fight this time around....!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 28 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
